channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Tools & Frameworks
channel.description: Latest Tools & Frameworks news in Context Engineering

item.title: Saying More Than They Know: A Framework for Quantifying Epistemic-Rhetorical Miscalibration in Large Language Models
item.description: arXiv:2604.19768v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit systematic miscalibration with rhetorical intensity not proportionate to epistemic grounding. This study tests this hypothesis and proposes a framework for quantifying this decoupling by designing a triadic epistem...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, RAG, tool, framework, study | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: WorkflowGen:an adaptive workflow generation mechanism driven by trajectory experience
item.description: arXiv:2604.19756v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents often suffer from high reasoning overhead, excessive token consumption, unstable execution, and inability to reuse past experiences in complex tasks like business queries, tool use, and workflow orchestration. Traditi...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, template, context, reasoning, tool | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: awesome-prompt-engineering - A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.
item.description: A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> tool, platform, paper, prompt, prompt engineering | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>

item.title: fastapi_mcp - Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!
